With.Name: Main
With.Cte: SELECT {{ Fields -Dimension: Products --Table: ProductsCte -WithComma }} {{ IfRequest -Expression: MinimumMultiple --MIN(PurchaseReports.MinimumMultiple) AS MinimumMultiple -Expression: SupplierLeadTime --MIN(PurchaseReports.SupplierLeadTime) AS SupplierLeadTime -Expression: Periodicity --MIN(PurchaseReports.Periodicity) AS Periodicity -Expression: WarehouseCoverage --MIN(PurchaseReports.WarehouseCoverage) AS WarehouseCoverage -Expression: ExpectedReplenishment --SUM(PurchaseReports.ExpectedReplenishment) AS ExpectedReplenishment -Expression: ActualPlannedWarehouse --SUM(PurchaseReports.ActualPlannedWarehouse) AS ActualPlannedWarehouse -Expression: Orders --SUM(PurchaseReports.Orders) AS Orders -Expression: OrdersAdjustedToMinimumAndMultiple --SUM(PurchaseReports.OrdersAdjustedToMinimumAndMultiple) AS OrdersAdjustedToMinimumAndMultiple -Expression: AdjustedOrderCost --SUM(PurchaseReports.AdjustedOrderCost) AS AdjustedOrderCost -Expression: RupturesWarehouse --SUM(PurchaseReports.RupturesWarehouse) AS RupturesWarehouse -Expression: RupturesStores --SUM(PurchaseReports.RupturesStores) AS RupturesStores -Expression: PlannedSalesToReception --SUM(PurchaseReports.PlannedSalesToReception) AS PlannedSalesToReception -Expression: IdealWindow --SUM(PurchaseReports.IdealWindow) AS IdealWindow -Expression: PendingReceptionsWarehouse --SUM(PurchaseReports.PendingReceptionsWarehouse) AS PendingReceptionsWarehouse -Expression: PendingReceptionsStores --SUM(PurchaseReports.PendingReceptionsStores) AS PendingReceptionsStores -Expression: ActualStockWarehouse --SUM(PurchaseReports.ActualStockWarehouse) AS ActualStockWarehouse -Expression: ActualStockStores --SUM(PurchaseReports.ActualStockStores) AS ActualStockStores -Expression: ShippingToStoresToReception --SUM(PurchaseReports.ShippingToStoresToReception) AS ShippingToStoresToReception -Expression: ReceptionWarehouseToReception --SUM(PurchaseReports.ReceptionWarehouseToReception) AS ReceptionWarehouseToReception -Expression: ReceptionStoreToReception --SUM(PurchaseReports.ReceptionStoreToReception) AS ReceptionStoreToReception -Expression: SalesTwoMonths --SUM(PurchaseReports.SalesTwoMonths) AS SalesTwoMonths -Expression: SalesSixMonths --SUM(PurchaseReports.SalesSixMonths) AS SalesSixMonths -Expression: AdjustedOrderCapacity --SUM(PurchaseReports.AdjustedOrderCapacity) AS AdjustedOrderCapacity -Expression: AdjustedOrderCapacityAdvanced --SUM(PurchaseReports.AdjustedOrderCapacityAdvanced) AS AdjustedOrderCapacityAdvanced -Expression: AdvancedOrder --SUM(PurchaseReports.AdvancedOrder) AS AdvancedOrder -Expression: ReductionDueToCapacity --SUM(PurchaseReports.ReductionDueToCapacity) AS ReductionDueToCapacity }} FROM Fact.PurchaseReports {{ InnerJoin -Dimension: Products --Table: ProductsCte -Table: PurchaseReports -On: ProductId-ProductId }} {{ GroupBy -Dimension: Products --Table: ProductsCte }}
With.Query: SELECT {{ Fields -Dimension: Products -WithComma }} {{ IfRequest -Expression: MinimumMultiple --MinimumMultiple -Expression: SupplierLeadTime --SupplierLeadTime -Expression: Periodicity --Periodicity -Expression: WarehouseCoverage --WarehouseCoverage -Expression: ExpectedReplenishment --ExpectedReplenishment -Expression: ActualPlannedWarehouse --ActualPlannedWarehouse -Expression: Orders --Orders -Expression: OrdersAdjustedToMinimumAndMultiple --OrdersAdjustedToMinimumAndMultiple -Expression: AdjustedOrderCost --AdjustedOrderCost -Expression: RupturesWarehouse --RupturesWarehouse -Expression: RupturesStores --RupturesStores -Expression: PlannedSalesToReception --PlannedSalesToReception -Expression: IdealWindow --IdealWindow -Expression: PendingReceptionsWarehouse --PendingReceptionsWarehouse -Expression: PendingReceptionsStores --PendingReceptionsStores -Expression: ActualStockWarehouse --ActualStockWarehouse -Expression: ActualStockStores --ActualStockStores -Expression: ShippingToStoresToReception --ShippingToStoresToReception -Expression: ReceptionWarehouseToReception --ReceptionWarehouseToReception -Expression: ReceptionStoreToReception --ReceptionStoreToReception -Expression: SalesTwoMonths --SalesTwoMonths -Expression: SalesSixMonths --SalesSixMonths -Expression: AdjustedOrderCapacity --AdjustedOrderCapacity -Expression: AdjustedOrderCapacityAdvanced --AdjustedOrderCapacityAdvanced -Expression: AdvancedOrder --AdvancedOrder -Expression: ReductionDueToCapacity --ReductionDueToCapacity -WhenRequestTotals --Default ---COUNT(*) OVER () AS TotalCount --Expression: MinimumMultiple ---MIN(MinimumMultiple) OVER() AS TotalMinimumMultiple --Expression: SupplierLeadTime ---MIN(SupplierLeadTime) OVER() AS TotalSupplierLeadTime --Expression: Periodicity ---MIN(Periodicity) OVER() AS TotalPeriodicity --Expression: WarehouseCoverage ---MIN(WarehouseCoverage) OVER() AS TotalWarehouseCoverage --Expression: ExpectedReplenishment ---SUM(ExpectedReplenishment) OVER() AS TotalExpectedReplenishment --Expression: ActualPlannedWarehouse ---SUM(ActualPlannedWarehouse) OVER() AS TotalActualPlannedWarehouse --Expression: Orders ---SUM(Orders) OVER() AS TotalOrders --Expression: OrdersAdjustedToMinimumAndMultiple ---SUM(OrdersAdjustedToMinimumAndMultiple) OVER() AS TotalOrdersAdjustedToMinimumAndMultiple --Expression: AdjustedOrderCost ---SUM(AdjustedOrderCost) OVER() AS TotalAdjustedOrderCost --Expression: RupturesWarehouse ---SUM(RupturesWarehouse) OVER() AS TotalRupturesWarehouse --Expression: RupturesStores ---SUM(RupturesStores) OVER() AS TotalRupturesStores --Expression: PlannedSalesToReception ---SUM(PlannedSalesToReception) OVER() AS TotalPlannedSalesToReception --Expression: IdealWindow ---SUM(IdealWindow) OVER() AS TotalIdealWindow --Expression: PendingReceptionsWarehouse ---SUM(PendingReceptionsWarehouse) OVER() AS TotalPendingReceptionsWarehouse --Expression: PendingReceptionsStores ---SUM(PendingReceptionsStores) OVER() AS TotalPendingReceptionsStores --Expression: ActualStockWarehouse ---SUM(ActualStockWarehouse) OVER() AS TotalActualStockWarehouse --Expression: ActualStockStores ---SUM(ActualStockStores) OVER() AS TotalActualStockStores --Expression: ShippingToStoresToReception ---SUM(ShippingToStoresToReception) OVER() AS TotalShippingToStoresToReception --Expression: ReceptionWarehouseToReception ---SUM(ReceptionWarehouseToReception) OVER() AS TotalReceptionWarehouseToReception --Expression: ReceptionStoreToReception ---SUM(ReceptionStoreToReception) OVER() AS TotalReceptionStoreToReception --Expression: SalesTwoMonths ---SUM(SalesTwoMonths) OVER() AS TotalSalesTwoMonths --Expression: SalesSixMonths ---SUM(SalesSixMonths) OVER() AS TotalSalesSixMonths --Expression: AdjustedOrderCapacity ---SUM(AdjustedOrderCapacity) OVER() AS TotalAdjustedOrderCapacity --Expression: AdjustedOrderCapacityAdvanced ---SUM(AdjustedOrderCapacityAdvanced) OVER() AS TotalAdjustedOrderCapacityAdvanced --Expression: AdvancedOrder ---SUM(AdvancedOrder) OVER() AS TotalAdvancedOrder --Expression: ReductionDueToCapacity ---SUM(ReductionDueToCapacity) OVER() AS TotalReductionDueToCapacity }} FROM GroupedCte {{ OrderBy -Dimension: Products }} {{Pagination}}
